sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68106" key="misofi/lippos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-φίλιππος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n68106.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hating Philip</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
